evals.prompt: Design the instruction-file architecture for a repo that supports Copilot, Gemini, and Claude without duplicating the same workflow text in three places.
evals.expected_output: Guidance that chooses one source of truth, recommends thin provider bridges, and separates durable repo rules from domain-specific skill detail.
assertions: The response chooses one instruction source of truth
The response recommends thin bridge or stub files for the other providers
The response distinguishes top-level instruction content from skill-level detail

evals.prompt: Review these repo instruction files after several skills and workflow commands changed and explain what must be updated.
evals.expected_output: A review that checks command lists, skill routing, bridge consistency, and whether provider files still match the shared instruction model.
assertions: The response checks command and skill-routing drift
The response validates bridge consistency across providers
The response avoids recommending parallel duplicated instruction bodies by default
